sectionTitle: Built for the Edge of Intelligence
sectionSubtitle: HeadyOS delivers the full Heady agent stack directly to your hardware — eight core capabilities that transform any device into a sovereign AI node.

features.title: Cross-Platform Runtime
features.description: HeadyOS runs natively on Web Browser (WASM), Linux x86/ARM64, macOS, Windows, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, and Cloudflare Workers. A single TypeScript/Node.js codebase compiles to platform-optimized binaries via Bun, ensuring consistent agent behavior regardless of the underlying hardware architecture.

features.title: Agent Orchestration Layer
features.description: The full 17-Swarm Matrix runs locally on-device. HeadyOS coordinates 20+ specialized AI agents — each mapped to one of the seven cognitive archetypes — using the CSL gate engine for routing, task decomposition, and inter-agent communication. No cloud round-trip required for orchestration decisions.

features.title: Edge AI Inference
features.description: HeadyOS integrates ONNX Runtime, llama.cpp, and Whisper.cpp for fully local model inference across text, speech, and vision modalities. Models are quantized using φ-scaled precision schedules, achieving sub-5ms first-token latency on ARM64 devices while maintaining output quality within 2.1% of cloud API baselines.

features.title: Persistent Agent State
features.description: Agent memory, task queues, and behavioral context persist across device restarts, network interruptions, and OS updates via an embedded SQLite store with φ-scaled vector indexing. Agents remember your preferences, ongoing projects, and interaction history indefinitely — your device knows you better the longer you use it.

features.title: Zero-Latency Local Processing
features.description: Critical agent decisions — security checks, context routing, memory retrieval, and CSL gate evaluation — execute entirely on-device without network dependency. HeadyOS maintains a local inference budget using φ-scaled resource partitioning, ensuring foreground agent tasks always receive priority allocation within 1ms scheduling jitter.

features.title: Secure Enclave
features.description: HeadyOS isolates cryptographic key material, agent identity certificates, and personal memory data within a tamper-resistant secure enclave using CRYSTALS-Kyber-768 for key encapsulation and CRYSTALS-Dilithium2 for signing. On Apple Silicon and modern ARM devices, HeadyOS leverages hardware-backed secure elements when available.

features.title: OTA Updates
features.description: HeadyOS delivers over-the-air updates for agent logic, model weights, skill packages, and system components using a blue/green hot-swap protocol that achieves zero downtime. Updates are verified with Dilithium2 signatures, φ-scheduled during low-activity periods, and can be staged, rolled back, or pinned per device policy.

features.title: φ-Scaled Scheduler
features.description: The HeadyOS task scheduler allocates CPU, memory, and I/O bandwidth using golden ratio partitioning: high-priority agent tasks receive φ× the resources of background tasks, which in turn receive φ× the baseline allocation. This creates a naturally cascading priority queue with mathematically predictable interference bounds and zero starvation.
